shell.batchActiveBanner: Batch active — processing continues in the background
shell.leaveBatchTitle: Leave while batch processing is active?
shell.leaveBatchMessage: {{label}} Backend processing will continue. You can return to the Batch Monitor at any time.

dashboard.title: Accountant Dashboard
dashboard.description: Central workspace for payroll accountants — employees, bulk processing, rules, and audit.
dashboard.employeesDescription: Create, edit, disable, and search employee master data.
dashboard.bulkDescription: Upload multi-payslip PDFs and run the backend pipeline.
dashboard.batchDescription: Watch stage progress for active and completed batch jobs.
dashboard.rulesDescription: Browse and version-edit labor-law rule packs with audit.

employees.title: Employee Management
employees.description: Browse and manage employee master data. Employees are business records — separate from login accounts.
employees.addDescription: Create an employee business record. This is not a login account — authentication can be linked later.
employees.editDescription: Update employee master data. Empty national ID leaves the existing value unchanged.
employees.emptyDescription: Create an employee profile to attach payslips, attendance, contracts, and validation history.
employees.noMatch: No employees match the current filters.
employees.notFoundDescription: The employee number does not exist in this workspace.
employees.disableMessage: The employee will be marked disabled and excluded from active payroll workflows. This does not delete historical documents or validation history.
employees.saveMessage: An audit entry will be recorded for this update.
employees.fieldNationalIdHint: Stored encrypted. Leave blank to keep unchanged when editing.

employeeProfile.description: Employee profile centered on document collections, monthly expectations, validation history, and audit.
employeeProfile.documentsIntro: Each document type is managed separately. Status reflects attached documents only — missing means no document has been attached.
employeeProfile.validationHistoryEmptyDescription: Validation history appears here after payroll modules execute for this employee.
employeeProfile.findingsEmptyDescription: Deterministic findings from validation modules will list here.
employeeProfile.auditEmpty: No audit entries for this employee
employeeProfile.name: Name

unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
unsaved.message: You have unsaved employee edits. Leave this page and discard changes?

validations.findingsDescription: Review aggregated deterministic findings across employees, departments, and batch runs.

payroll.name: Payroll validation
payroll.description: Deterministic payslip labor-law and compensation checks.

batches.uploadDescription: Upload a multi-payslip PDF. Processing continues on the backend even if you leave this page.
batches.uploadingMessage: Transferring file and queuing the pipeline…
batches.selectPdf: Select a PDF before starting bulk processing.
batches.startMessage: The PDF will be uploaded and processed on the server (split → OCR → parser → identify → validate → report). Closing this browser tab will not stop backend processing.
batches.matchIntro: Primary match key is National ID. Existing employees get documents attached. Unknown IDs require an explicit create decision; low confidence goes to Manual Review.
batches.matchFound: Matched existing employee {{number}} — {{name}}. Documents can be attached.
batches.matchNotFoundMessage: No employee matches this national ID. Create a new incomplete profile using only confidently extracted fields? Missing fields will not be invented.
batches.matchCreateHint: Create the employee from the Add Employee form with only known fields, then mark the profile incomplete.
batches.matchUnmatchedHint: Left unmatched. Low-confidence batch matches go to Manual Review — never auto-created.
batches.monitorDescription: Track pipeline stages for bulk jobs. Progress is served from the backend — an open browser is not required.
batches.emptyJobsDescription: Start a bulk PDF upload to create a pipeline job.

publish.title: Approve and publish payslip?
publish.message: This makes the reviewed payslip available in the Employee Portal and Employee AI Chat.
publish.requireCurrentValidation: Confirm the current Digital Payslip and run validation before publishing.

checks.corrections: All corrections are saved and confirmed
checks.validation: Current Digital Payslip has a completed validation run

review.resolutionDescription: Review and correct this payslip now, then attach it to an existing or new employee before publishing.
review.resolveBeforePublish: Attach this reviewed payslip to an employee before it can be published.
review.ignoreWarning: This extracted payslip will be permanently discarded. The document, extraction results, Digital Payslip, validation history and OCR results will NOT be saved. The employee will never see this payslip. This action cannot be undone.

validationHistory.title: Validation history
validationHistory.noFindings: No findings were recorded for this validation run.

empty.title: No active bulk upload
empty.description: Upload a PDF to begin processing employees.

emptyFilter.title: No employees match this filter
emptyFilter.description: Choose another status to review the remaining results.

unknown.title: Resolve Unknown Employee
unknown.description: Resolve this payslip only against employees in your organization.
unknown.notFound: This batch item is no longer available.
unknown.searchPlaceholder: Name, National ID, or employee number
unknown.ignoreDescription: Skip this payslip and continue processing the remaining employees.

reviewQueue.title: Approval & Manual Review
reviewQueue.description: Low-confidence employee identification never auto-creates records. Resolve matches here. Legal rule diffs also appear when proposed.
reviewQueue.emptyDescription: Items appear when identification confidence is below threshold during bulk processing.
reviewQueue.diffsEmptyDescription: MCP sync proposals will appear here for accountant approval.
reviewQueue.resolveCreate: Create incomplete employee from confident fields only

rules.title: Payroll Rules
rules.description: Browse YAML labor-law rule packs. Edits are versioned with reason and audit trail; rollback is supported.
rules.noVersionsDescription: Versions appear after the first edit.
rules.editWarningMessage: Changing legal rules affects deterministic validation for all future runs. A version snapshot and audit entry will be created. Proceed only with a documented reason.
rules.publishMessage: Save a new version of {{filename}} with reason: "{{reason}}"
rules.reasonRequired: A change reason is required (min 3 characters).
rules.rollbackMessage: Restore {{filename}} to version {{versionId}}. Current content will be versioned first.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Append-only trail for employee changes, rule edits, document uploads, matching, and overrides.
auditLogs.emptyDescription: Important accountant actions will appear here as the portal is used.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
errors.matchFailed: Employee match failed. Please try again.
errors.disableFailed: Could not disable the employee. Please try again or contact support.

explainability.title: Evidence details
explainability.unavailable: Extraction evidence is not available for this field.
explainability.userEdited: This field was manually edited. Extraction evidence does not support the current value.
explainability.userEditedOriginal: This field was manually edited. The evidence below describes the original extraction only.
explainability.conflict: This field has conflicting candidate evidence and requires human review.
explainability.alternativeGeometry: The geometry engine found another plausible association.
explainability.alternativePrimary: The association engine ranked this candidate first geometrically.
explainability.validationTraceSummary: {{supported}} of {{total}} extracted fields have traceable evidence.
explainability.validationTraceUnavailable: Traceable extraction evidence is unavailable for this result.
